description.value:
Dorin was the first dwarf to emerge from the Life Stream. As the world churned in its youth, Dorin carved order from chaos. With stone and will, he tunneled the first halls beneath the mountains and forged the bones of the world.

It is said Dorin taught fire to behave, earth to hold, and steel to remember shape. Where other gods brought chaos, beauty, or mercy, Dorin brought structure.

During the Age of Division, when many gods waged open war, Dorin kept his people hidden and protected. He forged the Great Wards that sealed deep cities from divine calamity, and he never broke faith with his kin—even when the stars fell and the mountains wept.

He is also credited with the invention of runecraft and the earliest forms of magical engineering. Some myths even claim Dorin created the Anvil of Eternity, where some gods go to forge relics of immense power.
